awards: Nominated for 2 BAFTA 1 win & 5 nominations total
writer: Mary Norton, Gavin Scott, John Kamps
actors: John Goodman, Jim Broadbent, Mark Williams
plot: The Borrowers are four-inch high "little people" who live under the floorboards. When the owner of the house they live in dies and her evil lawyer Ocious P. Potter wants to destroy the house to build luxury apartments in its place, they start to fight him with the help of the son of house owner, Pete.
